/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ar qc libCoconutEngine.a CMakeFiles/CoconutEngine.dir/src/Coconut/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoconutEngine.dir/src/Coconut/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoconutEngine.dir/src/Coconut/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoconutEngine.dir/src/Coconut/Object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoconutEngine.dir/src/Coconut/TextureManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoconutEngine.dir/src/Coconut/Vector2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoconutEngine.dir/src/Coconut/GameMap/Map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoconutEngine.dir/src/Coconut/GameMap/MapTweaker.cpp.o
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ranlib libCoconutEngine.a
